title: UValueCavity
description: UValueCavity: A U-Value representing the effective U-Value of cavity insulation. This does not include derating effects from any frame u-values but should be derated for any thermal bridges not modeled.

UValue.description: The U-Value of the cavity insulation.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
